/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Sandbox.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Sandbox.dir/Source/SandboxMain.cpp.o -o ../bin/Sandbox  ../lib/libEngine.a ../_deps/yaml-cpp-build/libyaml-cppd.a ../_deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libX11.so ../_deps/spdlog-build/libspdlogd.a ../_deps/glm-build/glm/libglm.a -ldl -lrt
